Heart Disease - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 IHD_MEDICAID_EVER Ischemic Heart Disease - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OST_COMBINED Osteoporosis - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 OST_MEDICARE Osteoporosis - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims
